evaluation_contract.traceability: Every equivalence goal traces to one or more SSOT sections.
evaluation_contract.functional_equivalence: RTL outputs must match FunctionalModel.apply for every SSOT transaction after each accepted command.
evaluation_contract.module_equivalence: Top module real_llm_counter_demo matches SSOT top_module and io_list.
evaluation_contract.coverage_closure: Function and cycle coverage bins (fcov_plan.json) must reach target_pct before signoff.
evaluation_contract.interface_protocol: Valid-ready handshake (cmd_valid/cmd_ready) follows SSOT cycle_model; cmd_ready is always 1.
evaluation_contract.dut_only_lint_compile: RTL must compile and pass lint with zero errors on DUT-only filelist before equivalence check.
evaluation_contract.simulation_evidence_freshness: Scoreboard events must come from a fresh simulation run, not cached results.
evaluation_contract.performance_cycle_evidence: Single-cycle command acceptance (0-cycle accept, 1-cycle effect) verified per cycle_model.
evaluation_contract.debug_observability: All debug_observability.waveform_must_probe signals visible in waveform.
evaluation_contract.maintainability: LLM-editable artifacts remain human-readable and SSOT-traceable.
evaluation_contract.locked_artifacts: functional_model.py, fcov_plan.json, and equivalence_goals.json are locked after human approval.
evaluation_contract.llm_editable_artifacts: functional_model.py, fcov_plan.json, equivalence_goals.json, decomposition.json may be re-authored by LLM before lock.
evaluation_contract.loopable_evidence_points: Self-check results, simulation scoreboard, and coverage reports are loopable.
evaluation_contract.non_loopable_human_decisions: Semantic changes to locked artifacts require human gate approval.

goals.description: After reset, RTL outputs match FunctionalModel.reset(): count=0, zero=1, max=0, accepted_count=0, status=0, cmd_ready=1.
CLEAR command (cmd=000) sets count to 0, zero=1, max=0, accepted_count increments, status=000.
LOAD command (cmd=001) sets count to load_value[7:0], zero/max flags recomputed, accepted_count increments, status=001.
LOAD with boundary values (0, 128, 255) produces correct count and flags.
INC command (cmd=010) increments count, saturating at 255.
INC at count=255 saturates: count stays 255, max=1, zero=0.
DEC command (cmd=011) decrements count, saturating at 0.
DEC at count=0 saturates: count stays 0, zero=1, max=0.
HOLD command (cmd=100) leaves count unchanged, accepted_count increments, status=100.
Invalid/reserved commands (cmd=5,6,7) treated as HOLD; count unchanged, status records actual cmd value, accepted_count increments.
accepted_count wraps from 0xFFFFFFFF to 0x00000000 after 2^32 accepted commands.
Back-to-back commands update count every cycle at full throughput.
zero and max flags are correct combinational functions of count for all values.
cmd_ready is always 1 during and after reset and during normal operation.
Command acceptance is 0-cycle (same edge), state update is 1-cycle latency, flags are combinational (0-cycle after count).
